steps.title: Keep the general present tense
steps.content: The sentence states a general biological fact about wood frogs. The surrounding verbs, such as is unable and helps prevent, use present tense.

steps.title: Reject shifted verb forms
steps.content:
• Choice A: Had survived shifts to past perfect.
  • Choice B: Survived shifts to simple past.
  • Choice C: Would survive makes the statement conditional rather than factual.

steps.title: Use present-tense agreement
steps.content: A simple present verb keeps the sentence focused on what the wood frog regularly does during subfreezing periods. The answer is D.
